18.reason: Error: 'fm[i-1]' is a character literal, not the variable fm[i-1]. It should be fm[i-1] without quotes.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: 'fm[i-1]' is a character literal, not the variable fm[i-1]. It should be fm[i-1] without quotes.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: 'fm[i-1]' is a character literal, not the variable fm[i-1]. It should be fm[i-1] without quotes.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  [syntax error: 'fm[i-1]' is a multi-character literal, should be fm[i-1]]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Single quotes around fm[i-1] create a multi-character constant, not the variable's value. Should be fm[i-1] + j.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Syntax error: 'fm[i-1]' is an invalid multi-character constant; should be fm[i-1]+j without single quotes.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Single quotes around 'fm[i-1]' cause a compilation error; should be 'fm[i-1] + j'
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The expression 'fm[i-1]' is enclosed in single quotes, making it a multi-character literal instead of the variable value. It should be fm[i-1] without quotes.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The character literal 'fm[i-1]' is invalid; it should be the variable fm[i-1] without quotes. Using single quotes around fm[i-1] treats it as a multi-character constant, which is not valid C and leads to incorrect behavior.]

9.reason: [inefficient but not error; however, i+1 access later may be out-of-bound]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  [inefficient but not error; however, i+1 access later may be out-of-bound]

12.reason: [When i=0, fm[i-1] accesses index -1, leading to out-of-bounds. Also, the condition should not be evaluated for i=0.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  [out-of-bounds when i==0 (fm[-1]) or i==len-1 (fm[i+1] may be '\0')]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [When i=0, fm[i-1] accesses index -1, leading to out-of-bounds. Also, the condition should not be evaluated for i=0.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Accessing fm[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds read; also fm[i+1] may access out-of-bounds if i is the last index. Should verify i>0 && fm[i+1]!='\0'.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Accessing fm[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds array access

16.reason: [Loop bound includes the second character, causing it to be printed twice. Should be j <= fm[i+1]-fm[i-1]-1.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  [loop condition should be j < fm[i+1]-fm[i-1] to avoid printing last character twice]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop bound includes the second character, causing it to be printed twice. Should be j <= fm[i+1]-fm[i-1]-1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Off-by-one error: loop condition should be j < fm[i+1]-fm[i-1] to avoid printing the end character itself during expansion.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Loop condition should be j < fm[i+1]-fm[i-1] to avoid printing the end character twice

27.reason: [logical error: prints character that may have already been printed during expansion]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  [logical error: prints character that may have already been printed during expansion]
